session.title: H5P Interactive Book Design & Development for Military Education Module
session.topic_summary: Design and implementation of an H5P interactive book for Module 3 (Mountain Mobility) in a military leadership LMS course. The session covers content structuring across 4 learning objectives, knowledge assessment integration, competency-based learning design, and LMS platform navigation. User demonstrated iterative problem-solving when encountering technical constraints around H5P file management and session timeouts.

competencies.name: Subject Matter Expert Collaboration & Content Management

axes.label: Instructional Design
axes.description: Competency in mapping learning objectives to content, assessment design, and pedagogical alignment

axes.label: Technical Execution
axes.description: Capability in using H5P tools, LMS navigation, and file management systems

axes.label: Strategic Thinking
axes.description: Ability to evaluate constraints, anticipate issues, and design robust learning pathways

axes.label: Problem Resolution
axes.description: Demonstrated troubleshooting, adaptation, and alternative solution development

axes.label: Engagement & Persistence
axes.description: Sustained effort, systematic approach to task completion, and iterative refinement

axes.label: Meta-Cognitive Awareness
axes.description: Reflection on process, recognition of constraints, and documentation of progress

blooms_progression.label: Remember
blooms_progression.title: Content Knowledge Recall
blooms_progression.description: User recalled module learning objectives and existing course structure; identified relevant H5P content types from dropdown menus; remembered proper naming conventions and content organization hierarchies from prior LMS experience.

blooms_progression.label: Understand
blooms_progression.title: Conceptual Comprehension
blooms_progression.description: User demonstrated understanding of how H5P interactive books structure content; explained the relationship between learning objectives and page content; articulated the purpose of knowledge check questions as formative assessment points; comprehended the content bank's role in file management.

blooms_progression.label: Apply
blooms_progression.title: Practical Implementation
blooms_progression.description: User applied instructional design principles by creating 4 pages aligned to 4 learning objectives; used H5P Multiple Choice question type to create knowledge checks; applied pedagogical content knowledge specific to military mountain mobility (rest step, herringbone step, plunge step); navigated Moodle interface to add activities and access content bank.

blooms_progression.label: Analyze
blooms_progression.title: Critical Examination
blooms_progression.description: User analyzed technical constraints (H5P file upload requirements vs. content bank approach); identified weaknesses in initial implementation pathway; recognized token constraints and adjusted strategy accordingly; evaluated alternative solutions (URL resource as workaround); decomposed complex task into component parts (pages, content types, assessment items).

blooms_progression.label: Evaluate
blooms_progression.title: Strategic Judgment
blooms_progression.description: User evaluated the effectiveness of different content structures for learning; judged appropriateness of multiple-choice questions for knowledge checks; assessed grading mechanisms against learning objectives; reflected on session progress and identified completion gaps; made value judgments about which pages needed immediate completion vs. secondary polish.

blooms_progression.label: Create
blooms_progression.title: Original Content Production
blooms_progression.description: User created original interactive learning content: designed page structure for 4-page interactive book; authored instructional text for all 4 pages covering military movement techniques; designed knowledge check questions with context-appropriate scenarios (herringbone step, wedge formation); synthesized subject matter expertise with instructional design best practices; produced multi-format assessment items.

timeline.title: Task Initiation & Navigation
timeline.description: User reviewed current course structure in Module 3, identified learning objectives, and navigated to content bank to begin H5P interactive book creation (minutes 0-15)

timeline.title: Book Metadata & Page 1 Creation
timeline.description: User created interactive book with title, added first page title, created instructional text content for individual movement fundamentals covering rest step, herringbone step, and plunge step techniques (minutes 15-45)

timeline.title: Page 1 Knowledge Check Design
timeline.description: User added multiple-choice knowledge check question to Page 1 with relevant scenario-based question and 3 answer options, marking correct answer (minutes 45-75)

timeline.title: Pages 2-4 Rapid Content Creation
timeline.description: User efficiently created Pages 2, 3, and 4 with instructional text for movement formations/pacing/breaks, Time-Distance Formula with calculation details, and water crossing/snow movement methods respectively (minutes 75-120)

timeline.title: Initial Save & Platform Navigation
timeline.description: User saved interactive book to content bank successfully, then navigated to course view to add H5P activity to Module 3 section (minutes 120-150)

timeline.title: Technical Constraint Recognition & Workaround Development
timeline.description: User encountered H5P package file upload requirement, recognized content bank alternative, attempted to use content bank link, experienced session timeout, and adapted strategy (minutes 150-180)

timeline.title: Session Recovery & Page 2 Knowledge Check Completion
timeline.description: User re-logged into system, returned to Module 3 content editing, successfully added knowledge check question to Page 2 with wedge formation scenario and formative assessment design (minutes 180-220)

timeline.title: Pages 3-4 Knowledge Check Initiation
timeline.description: User began adding knowledge check questions to Page 3 (Time-Distance Formula) and outlined structure for Page 4 completion, recognizing token constraints as limiting factor (minutes 220-240)

employer_value.title: Curriculum Design & Learning Architecture
employer_value.description: Demonstrated ability to design comprehensive multi-page learning experiences aligned to specific learning objectives using evidence-based instructional design principles including formative assessment integration and competency mapping.

employer_value.title: LMS Platform Mastery & Content Strategy
employer_value.description: Proficient in Moodle LMS administration, content bank file management, and strategic use of H5P interactive tools to create engaging, assessment-integrated learning experiences within enterprise learning environments.

employer_value.title: Problem-Solving & Technical Agility
employer_value.description: Demonstrated resilience in encountering technical constraints and developing alternative solutions; adapted workflow in response to platform limitations while maintaining content quality and instructional integrity.

employer_value.title: Assessment Design & Learner Analytics Readiness
employer_value.description: Designed knowledge check questions with point tracking capability, grading integration, and completion monitoring—enabling data-driven insights into learner performance and content effectiveness.

employer_value.title: Subject Matter Integration & Domain Expertise Application
employer_value.description: Successfully synthesized military education domain knowledge with instructional design methodology; created contextually accurate, tactically relevant learning content for specialized professional audience.

portfolio.title: Interactive H5P Course Module: Mountain Mobility Training
portfolio.subtitle: SELF-DIRECTED · APPLIED · FULLY DOCUMENTED
portfolio.secondary_title: Competency Cluster: Learning Experience Design & Platform Administration
portfolio.secondary_subtitle: PROFESSIONAL DEVELOPMENT · TECHNICAL EXECUTION · STRATEGIC IMPLEMENTATION

meta.notes: Session analysis based on comprehensive 28-message conversation spanning 4 days (1/21-2/23/2026) with multiple tool interactions and documented task milestones. Cognitive depth scoring reflects demonstrated mastery across Bloom's Levels 3-6, with particular strength in Create (original content production) and Evaluate (assessment design judgment). Time efficiency multiplier of 1.8x reflects the density of applied learning outcomes and direct production of deliverable artifacts within compressed timeframe compared to equivalent 12.5-hour LMS course. Knowledge value estimate ($3,200 USD) based on comparable corporate instructional design consulting rates ($75-100/hour × 12.5 equivalent hours + 30% premium for specialized H5P + military education domain expertise). ROI awareness scored at 65% due to limited explicit discussion of business metrics, though demonstrated understanding of learning outcomes, grading, and completion tracking. Meta-cognitive score of 68% reflects good self-awareness of constraints and process adjustments, though limited explicit reflection statements. Retention probability of 74% based on hands-on application, immediate artifact production, and iterative problem-solving. Engagement score of 82% reflects sustained effort across multiple sessions despite technical obstacles. Application readiness marked HIGH due to production of functional, deployment-ready learning asset.
